title: Biomedical AI Copilot with Neo4j and Qdrant
summary: A biomedical AI copilot demonstration integrating Neo4j graph database and Qdrant vector search to navigate PubMed literature. The system uses context engineering techniques to wire retrieval-augmented generation into an agentic system for medical research applications.
